zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John d'Abernon於大約1295年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞可巴姆時，他的父親Sir John d'Abernon II, Sheriff of Surrey31歲，母親Baroness Johanna of Dennis27歲。他和Maud Giffard至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1352年3月7日在英國素瑞可巴姆享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞斯托克 達阿波農。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John d'Abernon于大约1295年出生在英国英格兰素瑞可巴姆时，他的父亲Sir John d'Abernon II, Sheriff of Surrey31岁，母亲Baroness Johanna of Dennis27岁。他和Maud Giffard至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1352年3月7日在英国素瑞可巴姆享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞斯托克 達阿波農。

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John d'Abernon was born about 1295, in Cobham, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John d'Abernon II, Sheriff of Surrey, was 31 and his mother, Baroness Johanna of Dennis, was 27. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Maud Giffard. He died on 7 March 1352, in Cobham, Surrey, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Stoke D'abernon, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John d'Abernon est né environ 1295, à Cobham, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John d'Abernon II, Sheriff of Surrey, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Baroness Johanna of Dennis, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Maud Giffard. Il est décédé le 7 mars 1352, à Cobham, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Stoke D'abernon, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Stoke d'Abernon, Surrey, England: Stoke D'abernon, Surrey, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John d'Abernon um 1295 in Cobham, Surrey, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John d'Abernon II, Sheriff of Surrey 31 und seine Mutter Baroness Johanna of Dennis 27. Er hatte mit Maud Giffard mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 7. März 1352 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Cobham, Surrey, England und wurde in Stoke D'abernon, Surrey, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John d'Abernon è nato il circa 1295 nel Cobham, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John d'Abernon II, Sheriff of Surrey, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Johanna of Dennis, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Maud Giffard. Morì il 7 marzo 1352, nel Cobham, Surrey, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Stoke D'abernon, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John d'Abernonが約1295年にイギリスイギリススリーコブハムで生まれた時，父Sir John d'Abernon II, Sheriff of Surreyは31歳，母Baroness Johanna of Dennisは27歳であった。彼はMaud Giffardとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1352年3月7日にイギリススリーコブハムで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリーストク ド'アバーノンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John d'Abernon(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 컵함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John d'Abernon II, Sheriff of Surrey(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Johanna of Dennis(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Maud Giffard(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1352년 3월 7일 영국 수리 컵함에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 스토크 드'압른넌에 묻혔다.

pt.Stoke d'Abernon, Surrey, England: Stoke D'abernon, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John d'Abernon nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Cobham, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John d'Abernon II, Sheriff of Surrey, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Johanna of Dennis, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Maud Giffard. Ele faleceu em 7 de março de 1352, em Cobham, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Stoke D'abernon, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John d'Abernon родился около 1295 г. в местности кобхам, сурри, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John d'Abernon II, Sheriff of Surrey было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Baroness Johanna of Dennis, 27. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Maud Giffard. Он умер 7 марта 1352 г. в местности кобхам, сурри, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности сток д'абирнон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Maud Giffard. Murió el 7 de marzo de 1352, en Cobham, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Stoke D'abernon, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
